manual_review_required.reason: Cannot be inferred from the spec. Depends on model capabilities, deployment context, and the desired trust level for this integration.

The spec does not define whether agent credentials are scoped to a single team or grant write access across all teams. Verify that OAuth scopes or API key permissions are team-scoped before allowing autonomous writes.

PATCH operations on notification-settings affect all team members immediately. Determine whether bulk configuration changes by an agent require human approval or are captured in an audit log with rollback capability.

NEXUM-004 fired on 4 operations. No operation in this spec declares Idempotency-Key as a required header, which is why required_headers is empty. Before autonomous agent access, enforce Idempotency-Key at the gateway level for PATCH /notification-settings, PUT /channels/{channel_id}, and POST /channels.

POST /notification-settings/test has no Idempotency-Key. Agent retries on this endpoint will send duplicate test alerts to all team members. Confirm whether the orchestration layer enforces exactly-once delivery for this operation, or gate it behind explicit human invocation.
